notFound.description: 您查找的页面不存在或已被高级指挥部重新定位。
notFound.scanHint: 正在扫描信号... 未找到数据碎片。

error.heading: 出了点问题
error.description: 发生了意外错误。请重试。

toasts.resumeUnavailable: 无法继续 - 内容数据不可用。
toasts.loadingProgress: 正在加载进度数据，请稍候...
toasts.progressUnavailable: 无法继续 - 进度数据不可用。
toasts.episodeMissing: 无法继续 - 剧集信息缺失。
toasts.episodeLoading: 请等待当前剧集加载完成
toasts.partyMissing: 无法创建派对：内容详情缺失
toasts.partyCreated: 派对房间已创建！正在跳转...
toasts.partyFailed: 创建派对房间失败。请重试。
toasts.soundboardAuth: 您必须在派对中才能使用音效板
toasts.hostTimeout: 由于主持人未返回，观看派对已关闭。

welcome.title: 欢迎来到 Nightwatch
welcome.description: 让我们带您了解全新的极简电影体验。

search.title: 找到您的电影
search.description: 搜索超过12,000个标题。在这里输入您喜欢的电影或节目。

resume.title: 继续观看
resume.description: 从上次停下的地方继续。每一帧都已保存。

live.title: 直播活动
live.description: 加入正在进行的观影派对和直播。

watchlist.title: 您的队列
watchlist.description: 在这里保存电影和剧集以便稍后观看。

downloads.title: 离线保险库
downloads.description: 随时随地观看电影。在这里访问您的离线下载。

library.title: 你的资料库
library.description: 在一个地方浏览你保存的剪辑、录制和收集的内容。

askAi.title: 问AI
askAi.description: 与AI助手对话。请求推荐、搜索内容或用语音控制播放。

profile.title: 个人资料设置
profile.description: 管理您的账户、偏好设置并查看您的活动。

ready.title: 您已准备就绪
ready.description: 享受纯粹的电影体验。没有干扰。只有电影。

sidebar.title: Navigation
sidebar.description: Your main menu lives here. Hover the left edge anytime to open it.

friends.title: Friends & Social
friends.description: Your friends list, online status, and friend requests. Hover the right edge to open it anytime.

music.title: Music
music.description: Listen to curated radio stations and music while you browse.

offline.title: 您已离线
offline.description: Nightwatch需要网络连接才能浏览。请打开保险库查看已下载的内容。

metadata.homeDescription: 搜索电影和电视节目，开始一起观看。
metadata.continueWatchingDescription: 从上次停下的地方继续观看最近的电影和电视节目。
metadata.searchDescription: 搜索电影、电视节目和动漫。
metadata.profileDescription: 管理您的个人资料和观看历史。
metadata.liveDescription: 与朋友实时观看体育直播赛事和频道。
metadata.downloadsDescription: 访问已下载的电影和电视节目以供离线观看。
metadata.watchlistDescription: 跟踪您想稍后观看的电影和电视节目。
metadata.userProfileDescription: 查看 {name} 的观看活动和个人资料。

desktopApp.notInstalledDesc: 无法打开Nightwatch桌面应用。是否已安装？

errors.sessionExpired: 会话已过期。请重新登录。
errors.invalidInvite: 邀请链接无效或已过期。请申请新链接。
errors.otpRateLimit: 尝试次数过多。请稍后重试。
errors.validationError: 部分信息无效。请检查后重试。
errors.csrfFailed: 安全令牌已过期。请刷新页面。
errors.forbidden: 您没有执行此操作的权限。
errors.requestTimeout: 请求超时。请检查连接后重试。

landing.heroSubtitle: Synchronized playback, real-time watch parties, live streaming, voice calls, and messaging — all in one place.

watchTogether.title: Watch Together
watchTogether.desc: Synchronized playback with friends in real-time.

watchParties.title: Watch Parties
watchParties.desc: Video calls and shared controls over WebRTC.

goLive.title: Go Live
goLive.desc: Stream to your audience with RTMP and live chat.

messaging.title: Messaging
messaging.desc: DMs, voice calls, and online presence.

sync.title: Synchronized Playback
sync.desc: Watch movies, shows, and videos perfectly in sync with anyone. Play, pause, and seek — everyone stays on the same frame.

party.title: Watch Parties
party.desc: Peer-to-peer video calls with shared controls. See reactions in real-time over WebRTC.

live.title: Go Live
live.desc: Stream with RTMP ingestion, HLS delivery, and real-time chat with your audience.

music.title: Music Streaming
music.desc: Gapless playback, synced lyrics, crossfade, equalizer, and device transfer.

downloads.title: Offline Downloads
downloads.desc: Download content to your device. Watch anywhere — no internet required.

landing.downloadDesc: Picture-in-Picture, media keys, offline downloads, and Discord Rich Presence — available on all platforms.
landing.ctaDesc: Nightwatch is currently invite-only. Log in with your account to get started.

footer.disclaimer: Nightwatch does not host, store, upload, or distribute any media content. All content is sourced externally by users. The platform serves solely as a synchronization and communication layer. We are not responsible for any third-party content accessed through the platform.

clips.subtitle: Your clips and saved moments
clips.emptyDescription: Record moments from live streams to build your collection
